text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I join Gold Ship on our first shrine visit of the new
year.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Dang it! Why?! Say it ain't sooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For some reason, Gold Ship gets upset about
something the second we step onto the grounds.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: How can this be? It's only been a year, and yet!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yakisoba, of course! What else would I be talking
about?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Every year at this time, a bunch of food stands
pop up at shrines and stuff, and there's always
been a yakisoba stall!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But look! I don't see a single yakisoba stand
around this year!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Why?! Did yakisoba do something wrong?! Did
it?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't know what goes into setting up the food
stands, but it's probably just a coincidence that
no yakisoba stalls are set up this year.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Curses upon curses! How dare they treat yakisoba
with such disrespect!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Looks like I have to take things into my own
hands!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I've made up my mind! This year, I'm appointing
myself as the Umamusume ambassador of
yakisoba!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I'll spread the word and educate the whole world
about what makes yakisoba so great...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
And I won't stop until yakisoba retakes its rightful
place as the world's best junk food!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
And you'll be right behind me, of course! So,
what's our first strategy?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I doubt there's really a right answer in this
situation, but I try to answer genuinely.
choice_data_list:
We must deepen our understanding of its
deliciousness.
We have to learn the art of making yakisoba.
We have to brainstorm new recipes.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Deepen our understanding, you say?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yes, it is imperative that I am the world's number
one connoisseur of yakisoba...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Otherwise, how else can I get others to
understand its rich appeal?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Listen up, yakisoba! I'm going to do everything I
can to understand you! I'll love you more deeply
and passionately than anyone!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Yakisoba... art?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Now I see! The problem with the world of
yakisoba is its lack of flash and artistry!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Just think of the headlines if I miraculously
whipped out a plate of yakisoba from thin air!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I know my true path now! I'll revitalize the
yakisoba industry with epic-level magic tricks!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: New recipes?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You're absolutely right... Regular ol' yakisoba
can't take the world by storm!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Luckily, we live in a era of unrestricted
self-expression. I'm free to make yakisoba into a
dessert or even get rid of the noodles altogether!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
It's time to dive into the ocean of limitless
possibilities! Let's paint the horizon with a
yakisoba rainbow!
